name: playwright-side-runner
description: Playwright runner for Selenium IDE .side files

scripts.docs: sphinx-build -b html docs docs/_build && python3 -m http.server --directory docs/_build 8888
scripts.docs:zensical: sphinx-build -b html docs_zensical docs_zensical/_build && python3 -m http.server --directory docs_zensical/_build 8889
